g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PIR sensor detect occupancy?')
sendPrompt('How does the sound sensor detect abnormal noise?')
sendPrompt('How is the zone map defined in firmware?')
sendPrompt('How does the zone risk engine score each zone?')
g.text: temp + motion + sound → LOW / MED / HIGH per zone

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does zone occupancy tracking work?')
sendPrompt('How does the evacuation decision logic select the safest exit?')
g.text: selects safest exit · blocks HIGH-risk paths · picks Exit A or B

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do the LEDs provide directional guidance?')
sendPrompt('What buzzer patterns are used for each risk level?')
sendPrompt('What data is printed to Serial?')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32 send data to ThingSpeak over Wi-Fi?')
sendPrompt('What fields are logged in the ThingSpeak channel?')
sendPrompt('What does the ThingSpeak live dashboard show?')
